name: Ahrefs
tagline: SEO toolset for backlink analysis and keyword research
description: Ahrefs is one of the most powerful SEO platforms available, offering backlink analysis, keyword research, site audits, content explorer, and rank tracking. Trusted by SEO professionals and agencies worldwide for its comprehensive data.
use_cases: You're doing serious link building and need the most accurate backlink database available
Your team runs content gap analysis to find what competitor pages rank for that yours don't
You manage SEO for multiple client sites and need project-level rank tracking and audits
You want to validate keyword difficulty before investing in content — not just search volume
